# SynelWeb

> SynelWeb is a multilingual marketing website for modern web development services.

This file describes the main public pages, their purpose, and basic usage guidance for LLM-based summarization and navigation.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://synelweb.hu/): Main overview of the brand, positioning, and primary calls to action.
- [Blog](https://synelweb.hu/blog): Public blog index with articles, practical notes, and detail pages.
- [Services](https://synelweb.hu/services): Public overview of available web development services.
- [Projects](https://synelweb.hu/projects): Showcase of selected projects and implementation examples.
- [Technology](https://synelweb.hu/technology): Summary of the technology stack and technical approach.
- [About](https://synelweb.hu/about): Background information about SynelWeb and the person behind the brand.
- [Reviews](https://synelweb.hu/reviews): Public client feedback and review content.
- [Contact](https://synelweb.hu/contact): Current public contact details and contact options.

## Usage Notes

- [Language handling](https://synelweb.hu/): Respect the language shown in the URL prefix and prefer the visible localized page content.
- [Content reliability](https://synelweb.hu/): Use public page content as the source of truth and do not invent pricing, project results, or unavailable details.
- [Indexing scope](https://synelweb.hu/): Public marketing pages and metadata may be summarized, but private admin or internal endpoints are not intended for crawling.

## Optional

- [Brand website](https://synelweb.hu/): Canonical public website for SynelWeb.
